name: File Browser RPC
description: Read-only browsing and download RPC methods for a configured server directory.

rootPath.description: Absolute path to the directory that HQ should expose in the Files tab.

label.description: Label shown in HQ for the configured root directory.

previewMaxBytes.description: Maximum file size allowed for inline previews.

downloadMaxBytes.description: Maximum file or ZIP size allowed for downloads.

hideDotfiles.description: Hide dotfiles and dot-directories from listings and ZIP downloads.
